name: brownstone-careers-pages
description: Brownstone Careers Cloudflare Pages site with verified mobile navigation, secure recruitment forms, and a unified official Resend email design system using a dedicated sending subdomain.

scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/site-audit.mjs && node scripts/seo-audit.mjs && node scripts/test-emails.mjs && node --check public/script.js && node --check emails/index.js && node --check emails/index.cjs && node --check functions/_shared.js && node --check functions/api/applications.js && node --check functions/api/contact.js && node --check functions/api/health.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-forms.mjs && npm run build
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@latest pages deploy --project-name brownstone-careers --branch main
